title: lolium perenne f. compositum
intro: Lolium perenne f. compositum, also known as perennial ryegrass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lolium perenne f. compositum include soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of perennial ryegrass can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions.
